stem: A programmer is comparing two standard search algorithms.
model_answer: {"Linear search": ["Works on unsorted data", "Checks each item one by one"], "Binary search": ["Requires the data to be sorted", "Halves the search space on each step"]}
review_notes: Shuffle-test fixture for matrix_tick_multi. Column order is authored so the correct ticks cluster in a diagonal pattern — shuffling breaks the pattern visibly.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick every feature that applies to each search algorithm.
